ABOUT.TITLE: About
ABOUT.DESC: Computer Engineering graduate and Full-Stack Developer with a track record of building end-to-end applications. My experience spans across developing complex financial systems, mobile platforms, and automated solutions using Angular, Golang, Dart, Express, MongoDB, and MQL5. I specialize in turning client requirements into deployed, high-performance systems.

EXPERIENCE.TITLE: Experience
EXPERIENCE.L1: Collaborated with clients to translate business requirements into actionable technical specifications.
EXPERIENCE.L2: Engineered robust API endpoints using Golang/Express and integrated them with Postgresql for efficient data management.
EXPERIENCE.L3: Integrated APIs into the Angular frontend to deliver a seamless and responsive user experience.
EXPERIENCE.L4: Managed end-to-end deployment to production, ensuring system stability, high performance, and client satisfaction.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Projects
PROJECTS.P1_DESC: App to create and join sports rooms with real-time chat.
PROJECTS.P2_DESC: Automated trading EA triggered by news events.
PROJECTS.P3_DESC: An electronic invoicing solution to digitalize billing processes.

PROJECT_TEAMUP.TITLE: Team Up Mobile App
PROJECT_TEAMUP.OVERVIEW_DESC: Team Up is a mobile application for organizing pick-up sports games. Users can create or join activity rooms, communicate in real-time, and view locations on an integrated map for seamless team coordination.
PROJECT_TEAMUP.MF_4: Edit room settings (name, time, capacity, etc.)
PROJECT_TEAMUP.MF_6: Integrated map for venues and directions

PROJECT_TRADENEWS.TITLE: EA Forex Automation Tool
PROJECT_TRADENEWS.OVERVIEW_DESC: EA Forex Automation is a MetaTrader 5 Expert Advisor designed to automate trading during high-volatility news events. It uses pending buy/sell stop orders with adjustable lot sizes and trailing stop mechanisms to manage trades efficiently. The system includes license key verification to restrict unauthorized access and an Auto Trade mode with dynamic lot calculation based on account balance.
PROJECT_TRADENEWS.MF_1: License verification system to block unauthorized users
PROJECT_TRADENEWS.MF_2: Auto placing 5 levels of BuyStop and SellStop orders
PROJECT_TRADENEWS.MF_3: Customizable lot sizes for each level
PROJECT_TRADENEWS.MF_4: Dynamic lot calculation in Auto Trade mode
PROJECT_TRADENEWS.MF_5: Built-in Take Profit (TP) and Trailing Stop system
PROJECT_TRADENEWS.MF_6: Automatic order cancellation when price retreats
PROJECT_TRADENEWS.MF_8: Trading logs for review and analysis

PROJECT_EPROCUREMENT.TITLE: E-Procurement System
PROJECT_EPROCUREMENT.OVERVIEW_DESC: E-Procurement System is an electronic invoicing solution developed to digitalize and modernize traditional paper-based billing processes. It features a comprehensive dashboard for efficient creation, management, and step-by-step tracking of billing invoices.
PROJECT_EPROCUREMENT.MF_1: Awarded the 3rd Prize in Project Presentation at the ICT Open House 2025 (University of Phayao).
PROJECT_EPROCUREMENT.MF_2: Developed an E-Invoice module within an E-Procurement platform.
PROJECT_EPROCUREMENT.MF_3: Designed a comprehensive dashboard for step-by-step tracking of invoices.
